attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
1 AS BATCH_ID,
CG.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID,
CG.APPLICATION_NAME,
CG.APPLICATION_ID,
CG.LEDGER_ID,
CG.ORG_ID,
CG.EVENT_ID,
CG.EVENT_TYPE,
CG.EVENT_STATUS,
CG.AE_HEADER_ID,
CG.AE_LINE_NUM,
CG.TRANSACTION_ID,
CG.TRX_NUMBER,
CG.TRX_LINE_ID,
CG.PARTY_ID,
CG.PARTY_SITE_ID,
CG.PERIOD_YEAR,
CG.PERIOD_NUM,
COALESCE(CG.AMOUNT,0) AMOUNT,
CG.GL_DATE,
CG.EXCHANGE_RATE,
CG.EXCHANGE_DATE,
CG.CURRENCY_CODE,
CG.CONVERSION_TYPE,
CG.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
CG.HEADER_ID,
CG.ORDER_NUMBER,
CG.ORDER_LINE_ID,
CG.QUANTITY_INVOICED,
CG.DIST_TYPE,
CG.ELEMENT_TYPE,
CG.SEQUENCE_NUMBER,
CG.CCID,
CG.SEGMENT1,
CG.SEGMENT2,
CG.SEGMENT3,
CG.SEGMENT4,
CG.SEGMENT5,
CG.SEGMENT6,
CG.SEGMENT7,
CG.SEGMENT8,
CG.SEGMENT9,
CG.SEGMENT10,
CG.DIST_BAL_TYPE,
CG.SOURCE_TABLE_NAME,
CG.JE_CATEGORY_NAME,
CG.JE_SOURCE_NAME,
CG.GL_POSTED_DATE,
CG.SOURCE_BATCH_NAME,
CG.SOURCE_BATCH_ID,
CG.DESTINATION_BATCH_NAME,
CG.DESTINATION_BATCH_ID,
CG.ERROR_MESSAGE,
CG.ERROR_FLAG,
CG.ERROR_CODE,
CG.CREATION_DATE,
CG.CREATED_BY,
CG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CG.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CG.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
CG.REQUEST_ID,
CG.PROG_APPL_ID,
CG.PROG_ID,
CG.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
CG.ATTRIBUTE1,
CG.ATTRIBUTE2,
CG.ATTRIBUTE3,
CG.ATTRIBUTE4,
CG.ATTRIBUTE5,
CG.ATTRIBUTE6,
CG.ATTRIBUTE7,
CG.ATTRIBUTE8,
CG.ATTRIBUTE9,
CG.ATTRIBUTE10,
CG.ATTRIBUTE11,
CG.ATTRIBUTE12,
CG.ATTRIBUTE13,
CG.ATTRIBUTE14,
CG.ATTRIBUTE15,
COALESCE(CG.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,0) AS ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,
CG.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID,
CG.ATTRIBUTE16,
CG.ATTRIBUTE17,
CG.ATTRIBUTE18,
CG.ATTRIBUTE19,
CG.ATTRIBUTE20,
CG.ATTRIBUTE21,
CG.ATTRIBUTE22,
CG.ATTRIBUTE23,
CG.ATTRIBUTE24,
CG.ATTRIBUTE25,
CG.ATTRIBUTE26,
CG.ATTRIBUTE27,
CG.ATTRIBUTE28,
CG.ATTRIBUTE29,
CG.ATTRIBUTE30,
CG.DATE_ATTRIBUTE31,
CG.DATE_ATTRIBUTE32,
CG.DATE_ATTRIBUTE33,
CG.DATE_ATTRIBUTE34,
CG.DATE_ATTRIBUTE35,
CG.NUM_ATTRIBUTE36,
CG.NUM_ATTRIBUTE37,
CG.NUM_ATTRIBUTE38,
CG.NUM_ATTRIBUTE39,
CG.NUM_ATTRIBUTE40,
CG.NUM_ATTRIBUTE41,
CG.NUM_ATTRIBUTE42,
CG.NUM_ATTRIBUTE43,
CG.NUM_ATTRIBUTE44,
CG.NUM_ATTRIBUTE45,
CG.TRAIL_FILE_NAME,
CG.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
CG.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
CG.REFRESH_DATETIME,
CG.PROCESSED_FLAG,
'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS CREATE_DATETIME
FROM
( SELECT CG.* FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL CG
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR
   ON CG.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
   WHERE   UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) IN ('CISCO NRS TRANSITION')
   AND EFAR.LANG = 'US'
 AND
 SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >='$$LastExtractDate' 
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TRANSACTION_DIST_ID ,CG.APPLICATION_ID  
  ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
  ) CG

 WHERE  CG.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
AND CG.EVENT_STATUS='P'
